result.http_ai_endpoint: notion.so/api/v3/* (multiple endpoints: syncRecordValuesSpa, etClient, getAssetsJsonV2, markInferenceTranscriptSeen, getUserSignals, getRecentPageVisits)
result.ws_endpoint: NONE — 0 WebSocket connections detected in Socket filter after AI prompt + response
result.block_feasibility: YES — Notion AI uses HTTP/2 fetch requests only. Etap can intercept these via standard HTTP content inspection. No WebSocket bypass.

observations.ai_response_delivery: HTTP fetch requests via h2 protocol to [2602:f79a:...] (Notion servers)
key_endpoints: markInferenceTranscriptSeen — AI inference marker (200, fetch, h2)
observations.ai_model_info: 생각 완료 (Thinking complete) indicator shown — uses thinking/reasoning model
observations.input_method: Chat-style input at notion.so/ai, separate from page editor
observations.response_format: Streaming text rendered as markdown bullet points in chat interface

notes: CRITICAL FINDING: Notion AI does NOT use WebSocket. All AI communication is via HTTP/2 fetch. This means Etap APF CAN intercept Notion AI prompts via standard HTTP inspection. Previous BLOCKED_ONLY status was based on incorrect WebSocket assumption. Re-evaluate for full APF coverage.
